ASKAR TRADING INTERNATIONAL

About us

Welcome to Askar Trading International. Established in 2000, Askar Trading International has built a solid reputation as a trusted leader in the timber industry. With over two decades of experience, we specialize in providing high-quality timber products and services to meet the needs of our diverse clientele.

Read More

Our Gallery

View All

Soft Wood

Soft wood lumber is wood derived from coniferous trees like pine, fir, or spruce. It is lightweight, easy to work with, and commonly used in construction, furniture, and home improvement projects.

Read More

Hard Wood

Hardwood comes from broad-leaved, deciduous trees such as oak, maple, and walnut. It is generally denser, stronger, and more durable than softwood, making it ideal for furniture, flooring, cabinetry, and high-quality construction.

Read More

Sawn Timber

Sawn timber refers to wood that has been cut from logs into specific dimensions and shapes, typically in a sawmill. This lumber can come from various tree species and is used in a wide range of applications, including construction, furniture, and cabinetry.

Read More
